title: Digitizing the public sector
speakers: Sau Sheong Chang (DCE (Products) & CTO, GovTech), Marcel Weekes (VP, Product Engineering, Figma)
key_points: Sau Sheong Chang draws on his experience building government digital services to explore how the public sector and its institutions can be modernized.
The talk frames modernization as a convergence of three forces: design, technology, and systems thinking working together.
It centers on designing for everyone, treating inclusive, universal design as a core requirement of public-sector digital services.
Chang distills lessons that private-sector leaders can take away from the work of designing services for an entire population.
